questions.question: What are the three layers of the 'Full Stack Creator Funnel'?
questions.explanation: A complete funnel needs to reach new people (Discovery), build authority (Trust), and convert them (Sales).

questions.question: Which type of content builds the 'Bank of Trust'?
questions.explanation: Middle of Funnel (MOFU) content teaches the 'How' and proves your competence. This is where relationships are built.

questions.question: What is the recommended '70-20-10' mix for creators?
questions.explanation: Spend the majority of your time (70%) being helpful (Trust). Use 20% to grow reach (Discovery), and earn the right to sell 10% of the time.

questions.question: What happens if you post 90% TOFU (Discovery) content and 0% Sales content?

options.text: You become an 'Influencer' with lots of followers but no money

questions.explanation: Views do not pay rent. If you never make an offer (BOFU), you are just endlessly entertaining people for free.

questions.question: What is the function of a 'Bridge CTA'?

options.text: To ask people to like and subscribe
To move people from one funnel stage to the next (e.g., from Social to Email)
To link to a bridge construction company

questions.explanation: The Bridge CTA explicitly tells the user the next step: 'If you liked this (TOFU), read my newsletter (MOFU).' It captures the attention you just generated.

questions.question: Audit your last 3 posts. Which layer were they (Discovery, Trust, or Sales)? Which layer are you neglecting the most, and what is ONE post you could write tomorrow to fix that gap?
questions.promptForAI: Evaluate the student's diagnosis. Do they correctly identify a gap? Does their proposed 'fix' match the missing layer? (e.g., if they are missing Sales, they should propose an Offer post).
